calibration.milestone: Tier-1 live-feed recalibration (PS5 HDMI capture, broadcast HUD)
calibration.supersedes: 2.2.0 (center-clustered scorebug from CPU-vs-CPU YouTube clips; recoverable in git history)
notes: v2.3.0-live recalibrates for the REAL PS5 feed, which renders a FULL-WIDTH broadcast bar along the bottom (EA/MADDEN | home-logo | ABBR score x score ABBR | away-logo | quarter clock | play_clock | down&distance | streak), NOT the center-clustered scorebug v2.1.0/v2.2.0 assumed. The same elements are redistributed across x~300..1770: scores sit near center, clock/quarter ~+420px right, down/distance ~+880px right. Every region was remeasured off saved live refs (~/madden-recal-refs) and confirmed by rendering each box back onto the raw frame.
down & distance render as one contiguous string ('2ND & 6') -> merged into a single down_distance region, regex-split into down + distance (was two separate boxes).

field_position: no analog on this broadcast bar (the far-right glyph is a streak/momentum indicator, not ball-on). PARKED for the live path — dropped from the cadence read; revisit if a source is identified.

scores: a large italic numeral that EasyOCR's detector drops in isolation (known-weak, ADR 0013 -> total non-detection on this bar). scores_combined reads the '<n> x <n>' pair in one box and splits; individual boxes are the fallback. If both fail live, scores degrade to null (the payload is nullable) and a dedicated score-OCR pass (template/digit-classifier) is banked as follow-up.

play_call: the human play-call screen has NO '<Formation> - N Plays' banner. The formation is read from the play-card SUBTITLE ('<Family> <Sub-formation>', e.g. 'Singleback Deuce Close'), which repeats under all visible cards -> read multiple cards and majority-vote. The play-call-screen STATE SIGNAL moved from the banner's 'N Plays' suffix to the standalone plays_count element (top-right '15 Plays'). See ADR 0014 + the live recal report.

ContextDetector RETUNED (v2.3.0-live) against 54 live frames: rule is now 0.30<=dark_frac<=0.78 AND bar_mean>=60 (bottom-bar luma rejects the pause menu). 0 FP / 0 FN across both play-call sub-views + gameplay/pause/replay/corrupted. Formation read is banner-first (formation-select '<Formation> - N Plays') with play-card-subtitle fallback (play-select).

clock_seconds [1383,1013,68,40]: the SECONDS-ONLY sub-crop of the clock box (the 'SS' of 'M:SS'), added for the style-aware digit reader (digit_reader.py). EasyOCR's blanket 7->1 clock sub collapses a real :17->:11 in the SECONDS; the patch-NCC reader reads the two seconds digits from this zone with abstain-over-guess and splices them into the clock, leaving minutes/colon on the existing EasyOCR path. Zone gate-verified live (clock 4:32->4:27, isolates cleanly, reads :37/:31/:27 correctly). See docs/phase-completions/digit-ocr-reader-result.md.

distance_digit [1693,1010,33,44]: the single distance digit after the '&' (excludes the ampersand; '&' ends ~x=1690, digit sits ~1695-1720). Feeds the patch-NCC distance reader (digits 1-9) to fix the single-digit '1<->7' distance collision. Applied via an agreement-or-1<->7 gate in ocr_pipeline._reader_distance so it never fabricates on the confusable 3/5/6/8 cluster; multi-digit distances (>=10) stay on the EasyOCR right_cluster path. Held-out verified (2ND & 7->7, 2ND & 1->1 @ NCC ~1.0).
calibration.v2.5.0-ps5-game: scorebug bboxes + gcsec/dist templates re-fit on game_hud_1 (KC vs LV, 2026-07-13)

live_gameplay.description: In-play full-width broadcast bar along the bottom (~y985..1060). Present during snaps in every mode on the live PS5 feed.

play_call.description: Pre-snap play-call overlay. Formation NAME is read from the play-card subtitles (repeated per card, voted); play-call-screen state signalled by the standalone plays_count element. Present in human-played gameplay; absent in CPU-vs-CPU.

formation_banner.note: FORMATION-SELECT sub-view: centered '<Formation> - N Plays' banner (e.g. 'Trips - 12 Plays'). PRIMARY formation read on the live feed — clean OCR, maps to canonical-8 well. Blanks mid-scroll (returns null that frame). Confirmed across 18 live frames (v2.3.0-live).

formation_name.note: PLAY-SELECT sub-view fallback: card-1 (leftmost) subtitle '<Family> <Sub-formation>', e.g. 'Singleback Deuce Close'. Used when the formation_banner is absent (user drilled into a formation's plays). See ADR 0014.

formation_name_2.note: Card-2 subtitle — same formation text; used for majority-vote redundancy.

formation_name_3.note: Card-3 subtitle — same formation text; used for majority-vote redundancy.

plays_count.note: Top-right '<N> Plays' counter. Play-call-screen STATE SIGNAL (replaces the v2.2.0 banner 'N Plays' suffix).

formation_tab.note: Selected formation tab (sub-formation only, e.g. 'Deuce Close'). Secondary / disambiguation source; not the primary read.
